<!-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE

1. Give your PR a clear title summarizing the change (e.g.,
   "Fix typo in clause 4.5.1" or "Add clause for biometric data resale").
2. Under each ## heading below, TYPE YOUR ANSWER on the lines
   provided (or directly above the next heading).
3. Lines wrapped in HTML comment syntax (an angle bracket, exclamation
   mark, two dashes ... two dashes, angle bracket) are hidden
   instructions for you; they do NOT appear in the published PR. Leave
   them as-is or delete them — your choice.
4. Check boxes by replacing [ ] with [x].
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply by replacing [ ] with [x] -->

- [ ] 📝 Typo / wording / formatting fix
- [ ] ➕ New clause
- [ ] ✏️ Existing clause edit
- [ ] 🐛 Clause-conflict / loophole fix
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update (README.md, FAQ, CHANGELOG.md, etc.)
- [ ] 🏗️ Repository infrastructure (Jekyll, GitHub config, etc.)
- [ ] 🌐 Translation
- [ ] 🔒 Security-related fix

## What does this PR do?

<!-- Type a clear description of the change. -->

## Which section or clause does it affect?

<!-- Type the affected section/clause/file here.
     Example: "Section 4.5", "clause 3.2.1", "README.md", or "New section". -->

## Why does this change belong in PSVL?

<!-- Type the real-world threat, use case, or readability issue it addresses. -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to related issues. Use "Closes #123" to auto-close them on merge. -->

## Testing / Verification

<!-- For text changes: did you check cross-references and clause numbering?
     For Jekyll changes: did the site build locally? Type details here. -->

## Breaking Changes

<!-- Does this change require a major version bump? If yes, explain here.
     Otherwise, type "None". -->

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm each item by replacing [ ] with [x] -->

- [ ] I am at least 18 years old
- [ ] This is my own original work
- [ ] I have read [**CONTRIBUTING.md**](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I understand my contribution permanently transfers to the Author
      under [**Section 5.2 of PSVL.txt**](../PSVL.txt)
- [ ] I have not included malicious content or intentional loopholes
- [ ] I have added my change to the `[Unreleased]` section of
      [**CHANGELOG.md**](../CHANGELOG.md) if my change adds, removes,
      or meaningfully alters a clause (only the maintainer publishes
      tagged releases)
- [ ] Cross-references in [**PSVL.txt**](../PSVL.txt) still resolve (if I changed clause numbering)
